description: Delegation routing configuration. Scoring rules are hardcoded in hooks/scripts/delegation-enforcer.py for safety. mutation_rules gates the self-tuning loop (see its _doc).

mutation_rules._doc: Global self-tuning switch. When true, the delegation-outcome-tracker appends outcome rows to _memory/analytics/cognitive-fitness.jsonl and recalc-fitness.py turns them into the fitness caches the delegation hooks read; config self-tuning components additionally use that signal, guarded by a minimum-sample threshold (no tuning until a task_type has 8 real outcomes). OFF SWITCH: set v2_tuning_enabled to false - this halts fitness-ledger appends AND all config self-tuning in one step.
